name: Transfer board
description:
【Versatile Transfer Board】: This slide transfer board is designed to assist individuals with mobility in moving from beds, wheelchairs, chairs, cars, and other locations. It can be used for self transfer or with the help of a caregiver.

【Anti Slip Design】: The board features an 11.5cm anti slip area on both ends to prevent slipping during transfers. Additionally, it has five 2.3cm reinforcement ribs to enhance weight bearing capacity and ensure stability.

【Easy and Efficient】: This transfer tool allows individuals with mobility issues to move their bodies easily and efficiently, saving time and effort.

【Material】: Made from ABS steel, this slide transfer board is strong and with a maximum load capacity of 150kg (330lbs). It will not break when used within a 40cm distance.

【Product Dimensions】: The board for transferring measures Length 80cm/31.50inch; Width 21cm/8.27inch; Thickness 1cm/0.39inch, compact enough for easy storage yet large enough for safe transfers.
location: Hougang, Ponggol, Sengkang, Serangoon Garden
